newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The Oklahoma data-center liquid-cooling production ramp and CDU push were disclosed at the early-May Oppenheimer conference (predates the window), and DA Davidson reiterated a $100 PT. Stock +1.8% since June 9.

sources.label: Franklin Electric talks data-center liquid cooling (Yahoo Finance)
Franklin Electric $100 PT maintained, DA Davidson (Investing.com)

verdicts.rankRationale: Nothing material since June 9 on the water/pumping-for-compute latent-node lens. Oklahoma CDU/liquid-cooling ramp predates June 6 and is already in the prior hold; +1.8% is drift, not new evidence. Thesis quietly intact - small CDU optionality but no fresh catalyst. Hold.
verdicts.bull: CDU/liquid-cooling line for data centers; record 2026 capex +20%; $160M new-product revenue target by 2028 with data-center channel growth.
verdicts.neutral: Data-center revenue still nascent vs. core water/fueling base; +8% YTD; conference disclosure already priced.
verdicts.bear: Cyclical groundwater/fueling demand; CDU is small and unproven contributor; tariff/ag headwinds.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Oklahoma CDU ramp orders; Q2 print
verdicts.primaryRisk: Core pumping demand softness and slow CDU uptake
